arts.ttl: Arsenal in Real Madrid battle for €50m wonderkid
arts.sum: Ancelotti has already confirmed that Real Madrid are keeping tabs on Paz with a view to potentially bringing him back to the club eventually, but they will also stand to benefit if Como were to sell to someone else. Arsenal have been keeping tabs on the development of Como youngster Nico Paz, according to Italian media.

arts.ttl: Rodrygo: “If we get City it will be tough as always, but they are all tough opponents.”
arts.sum: Rodrygo Goes was the star of the show as Real Madrid cruised to a 3-0 victory over Brest in the Champions League, scoring two goals and once again unveiling his new celebration inspired by WWE legend John Cena. “Perhaps the behind-the-scenes is more important from the outside (media) because inside we are all very united and we know the importance of each player.

arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola Reacts To Manchester City’s Potential Real Madrid Clash
arts.sum: City now awaits a monumental clash against either Real Madrid or Bayern Munich in the playoffs, but Guardiola remains unfazed. “But that’s in two weeks, and by then, we’ll have some players back and our new signings available.

arts.ttl: Rodrygo's 'pinpoint finish' gives Real Madrid the lead against Brest
arts.sum: Real Madrid forward Rodrygo grabs his twelfth goal of the season with a clinical finish to open the scoring against Brest in the Champions League.

arts.ttl: Bellingham doubles Real Madrid's lead against Brest
arts.sum: England midfielder Jude Bellingham finishes off a swift Real Madrid counter-attack to put the European Champions 2-0 up away at Brest.

arts.ttl: Bellingham scores as Real Madrid see off Brest
arts.sum: Real Madrid must go through the Champions League play-offs after failing to finish in the top eight despite comfortably beating Brest 3-0 on matchday eight of the group phase at the Stade du Roudourou.
